Ƭ **RawProjectGraphDependency**: [`ImplicitDependency`](/docs/reference/devkit/ImplicitDependency) \| [`StaticDependency`](/docs/reference/devkit/StaticDependency) \| [`DynamicDependency`](/docs/reference/devkit/DynamicDependency)

A [ProjectGraph](/docs/reference/devkit/ProjectGraph) dependency between 2 projects

See [DynamicDependency](/docs/reference/devkit/DynamicDependency), [ImplicitDependency](/docs/reference/devkit/ImplicitDependency), or [StaticDependency](/docs/reference/devkit/StaticDependency)
